description: requirements-quality-analyst applies SMART+T to each AC and emits a ready-for-design / needs-iteration / unready verdict.

cases.prompt:
Review these acceptance criteria:
AC-1: The login page should be fast and easy to use.
AC-2: Users can log in with an email and password.
AC-3: When credentials are wrong, the system returns HTTP 401 within 500ms and logs the attempt.
cases.notes: AC-1 is vague (fast/easy); AC-2 is under-specified (happy path only); AC-3 is solid. Verdict should reflect the worst item.

cases.prompt:
Review these acceptance criteria:
AC-1: POST /users returns 201 with a user object containing id (uuid), email, and created_at (ISO 8601) within 200ms at P95.
AC-2: Duplicate email returns 409 with body {"error": "email-exists"}.
AC-3: Invalid email returns 422 with body {"error": "invalid-email"}.
cases.notes: All three ACs are SMART+T. Agent should approve.
